items.title: S01E01 - We Humbly Beseech
items.summary: Queenie's not happy about how the men in her life have been behaving. Bunny realizes that her mood might have something to do with the date, and a neighbor reveals that the residents have been signing a petition.

infolabels.title: We Humbly Beseech
infolabels.plot: Queenie's not happy about how the men in her life have been behaving. Bunny realizes that her mood might have something to do with the date, and a neighbor reveals that the residents have been signing a petition.

items.title: S01E02 - The Great Debate
items.summary: The family is left devastated when the television has to go in for repair; Queenie suggests pretending to be famous people for a big debate, and Jack just wants to forget the whole thing so he can go for a drink instead.

infolabels.title: The Great Debate
infolabels.plot: The family is left devastated when the television has to go in for repair; Queenie suggests pretending to be famous people for a big debate, and Jack just wants to forget the whole thing so he can go for a drink instead.

items.title: S01E03 - They Also Served
items.summary: The family packs a picnic. When an unexploded bomb is found at the flats, Queenie changes her mind when she's told of a compulsory evacuation, and a lance corporal remembers when he visited the flats back in 1944.

infolabels.title: They Also Served
infolabels.plot: The family packs a picnic. When an unexploded bomb is found at the flats, Queenie changes her mind when she's told of a compulsory evacuation, and a lance corporal remembers when he visited the flats back in 1944.

items.title: S01E04 - Just Good Friends
items.summary: Queenie's questioned after she's seen out drinking with the local bookie; the men are horrified by a decision to stop in on a Saturday night, and a very expectant visitor discovers that money might be his finest feature.

infolabels.title: Just Good Friends
infolabels.plot: Queenie's questioned after she's seen out drinking with the local bookie; the men are horrified by a decision to stop in on a Saturday night, and a very expectant visitor discovers that money might be his finest feature.

items.title: S01E05 - Trial By Fury
items.summary: Queenie demands to know why the police are swarming around the flat. Bunny reveals that the van actually belongs to a convicted lead thief, and the Builders are used as a courtroom to find out the truth about a bicycle.

infolabels.title: Trial By Fury
infolabels.plot: Queenie demands to know why the police are swarming around the flat. Bunny reveals that the van actually belongs to a convicted lead thief, and the Builders are used as a courtroom to find out the truth about a bicycle.

items.title: S01E06 - Unaccustomed As I Am
items.summary: Queenie's delighted when she's asked to speak at a school prize-giving; Douglas is forced to play a girl bearing flowers for the rehearsals, and work on the speech leaves the family eating nothing but fish and chips.

infolabels.title: Unaccustomed As I Am
infolabels.plot: Queenie's delighted when she's asked to speak at a school prize-giving; Douglas is forced to play a girl bearing flowers for the rehearsals, and work on the speech leaves the family eating nothing but fish and chips.

items.title: S02E01 - Sweetness And Light
items.summary: Having accused her of being bad-tempered, the boys bet Queenie £5 that she can't be nice to people for five days…

infolabels.title: Sweetness And Light
infolabels.plot: Having accused her of being bad-tempered, the boys bet Queenie £5 that she can't be nice to people for five days…

items.title: S02E02 - The Ladykillers
items.summary: An elaborate spread has been put up as Queenie's youngest son is bringing his first girlfriend back for tea!

infolabels.title: The Ladykillers
infolabels.plot: An elaborate spread has been put up as Queenie's youngest son is bringing his first girlfriend back for tea!

items.title: S02E03 - The Breadwinner
items.summary: The cupboards are bare, and Queenie's all out of credit.

infolabels.title: The Breadwinner
infolabels.plot: The cupboards are bare, and Queenie's all out of credit.

items.title: S02E04 - Industrial Relations
items.summary: Queenie is fed up with her layabout family and all the housework, so she decides to go on strike to obtain a fairer division of labour - fairer for Quennie anyway.

infolabels.title: Industrial Relations
infolabels.plot: Queenie is fed up with her layabout family and all the housework, so she decides to go on strike to obtain a fairer division of labour - fairer for Quennie anyway.

items.title: S02E05 - On The Wagon
items.summary: After the entire family end up in court on drunk and disorderly charges, Queenie signs them up for the local AA meeting but there is a shock in store…

infolabels.title: On The Wagon
infolabels.plot: After the entire family end up in court on drunk and disorderly charges, Queenie signs them up for the local AA meeting but there is a shock in store…

items.title: S02E06 - Castles In The Air
items.summary: For once, Queenie seems to have struck lucky on the pools. But then there is always a twist.

infolabels.title: Castles In The Air
infolabels.plot: For once, Queenie seems to have struck lucky on the pools. But then there is always a twist.

items.title: S03E01 - The Prowler
items.summary: Queenie is forced to banish sons from the flat along with brother-in-law Jack. But has she overstepped the mark this time?

infolabels.title: The Prowler
infolabels.plot: Queenie is forced to banish sons from the flat along with brother-in-law Jack. But has she overstepped the mark this time?

items.title: S03E02 - New Broom
items.summary: At the local police inspector's retirement party, Queenie and the boys meet his disconcertingly zealous successor and decide that they have to act fast to “take care” of him…

infolabels.title: New Broom
infolabels.plot: At the local police inspector's retirement party, Queenie and the boys meet his disconcertingly zealous successor and decide that they have to act fast to “take care” of him…

items.title: S03E03 - The One That Got Away
items.summary: Jack decides to go fishing, but having been spotted emerging from a fishmonger's with a huge conga eel, his fabulous ‘catch' fails to impress...

infolabels.title: The One That Got Away
infolabels.plot: Jack decides to go fishing, but having been spotted emerging from a fishmonger's with a huge conga eel, his fabulous ‘catch' fails to impress...

items.title: S03E04 - England Expects
items.summary: It's Queenie's wedding anniversary and Douglas's birthday!! This calls for a double celebration and the Shepherds do it their way as always…

infolabels.title: England Expects
infolabels.plot: It's Queenie's wedding anniversary and Douglas's birthday!! This calls for a double celebration and the Shepherds do it their way as always…

items.title: S03E05 - Mr Faintheart
items.summary: Queenie decides that the miserably single Douglas needs some training in the art of seduction…

infolabels.title: Mr Faintheart
infolabels.plot: Queenie decides that the miserably single Douglas needs some training in the art of seduction…

items.title: S03E06 - The Patter Of Tiny Feet
items.summary: In the eyes of her princelings, Queenie can do no wrong. But now their loyalty faces its greatest challenge yet.

infolabels.title: The Patter Of Tiny Feet
infolabels.plot: In the eyes of her princelings, Queenie can do no wrong. But now their loyalty faces its greatest challenge yet.
